rationale: Codebase-pin lens. Every round-2 addition has a real, grounded body — no stubs/TODO/panic. reviewGroups() reads review/, sorts deterministically, routes each <slug> via panelSpec→specExists then numericPrefix→listSpecIDs, skips+records loose files and un-routable dirs; reviewRules/routeReviewSlug/panelSpec/specExists/listSpecIDs/numericPrefix/firstSegment/touchedRoots all substantive. DefaultFlattenPlan +3 dogfood groups; DefaultFlattenRules +3 asymmetric eviction rules. CleanForcePaths is real across gitutil (rejectOptionLike SEC-5 guard, `--` separator, empty→CleanForce) + Executor iface + MindspecExecutor passthrough + Mock record/Fn/Err. WithPlan/WithRules/WithRootDocs set+return. writeLineage now gates each entry on dest existence and carries Skipped. resolvePlan freezes Plan into run-state and regenerates review rules deterministically on resume — index space stable. processGroup MkdirAll's the deep reviews/ parent before GitMv, so the co-location move lands. Build clean for all four packages. Tests assert consequentially: routing by panel.json spec (non-numeric slug) AND slug-prefix (no-panel slug); depth-change links resolve via real CheckMovedTreeLinks; rollback restores pre-run ref + porcelain-clean tree; scoped clean preserves untracked file OUTSIDE roots. R1 dissent closed; my R1 doc-artifact minor fixed. No new blocker.

findings.issue: reviewGroups()/routeReviewSlug/panelSpec/specExists/listSpecIDs/numericPrefix/reviewRules/touchedRoots/firstSegment, CleanForcePaths (gitutil+Executor+MindspecExecutor+Mock), WithPlan/WithRules/WithRootDocs, resolvePlan, removeEmptyReviewDir, and the +Skipped/dest-gated writeLineage all carry real bodies grounded on verified pre-existing infra (processGroup MkdirAll+GitMv, exists(), failAt seams, stage constants). No TODO/panic/stub.

TestMover_DogfoodAndReviewMoves asserts routing by panel.json spec AND slug-prefix, dogfood eviction to project-docs (not docs/ alias), absolute cross-tree link rewritten while symmetric sibling preserved, README rewrite, un-routable dir skipped+recorded, CheckMovedTreeLinks 404-free, and full lineage map. TestMover_ReviewTreeRemovedWhenFullyMigrated proves root review/ removed only when fully migrated. TestMover_RollbackAfterDogfoodReview fails at group 5 (dogfood) and asserts pre-run ref + porcelain-clean restore. TestCleanForcePaths_ScopedToRoots proves scope+preservation. Not hollow.
My round-1 minor — the applyRewritesInTree doc-comment self-correction artifact ('Returns the repo-… no, returns...') — is now trimmed to one clean sentence.

writeLineage records a group when its dest exists on disk. A planned-but-unmoved group whose dest path pre-existed for an unrelated reason would be recorded as a false move. Not realistic for the spec-106 trees (destinations are fresh) and not a blocker; flag only as future provenance hardening.
